page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9a.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU corresponds to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-CPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

This hardware configuration is designed for memory-intensive workloads that benefit from dedicated physical cores and high memory density. Suitable use cases include in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, enterprise applications, and data analytics pipelines that require substantial RAM without GPU acceleration or local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9a.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per core. The server does not include local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. With dedicated physical cores and a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it delivers predictable execution for memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and data processing applications.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and a high memory-to-CPU ratio for demanding data workloads.
